things.name: LEGOLAND Malaysia
things.description: Southeast Asia's first LEGOLAND - family theme park and water park

things.name: Istana Besar (Grand Palace)
things.description: 1866 royal palace of the Sultan of Johor with the Royal Abu Bakar Museum

things.name: Johor Bahru Old Chinese Temple
things.description: 1870s temple complex dedicated to Tua Di Ya Pek - among the oldest in Malaysia

things.name: Danga Bay Waterfront
things.description: Waterfront entertainment complex on the Johor Strait with Singapore views

things.name: Sultan Abu Bakar State Mosque
things.description: 1900 Victorian-Moorish mosque built by the Maharaja Abu Bakar of Johor

things.name: Johor Bahru City Square
things.description: Shopping mall built over a colonial train station with Singapore day trips

things.name: Singapore Day Trip
things.description: Walk or take a bus across the Causeway to Singapore in 45 minutes

things.name: Arulmigu Sri Rajakaliamman Glass Temple
things.description: Unique Hindu temple covered entirely in coloured glass

things.name: Chinese Heritage Museum
things.description: History of Johor Bahru's Chinese community since the 1870s

things.name: Roti Canai at Meldrum Walk
things.description: The best roti canai in the country at JB's famous hawker street
